chapter_context.summary: Israel is defeated at Ai because of Achan's sin; Achan is judged and the camp purified.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Defeat at Ai (7:1-5), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Joshua.
This section focuses on Joshua's Prayer and God's Answer (7:6-15), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Joshua.
This section focuses on Achan's Sin and Judgment (7:16-26), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Joshua.

key_themes.title: Courage
key_themes.description: The requirement to be 'strong and courageous' in the face of giants.

key_themes.title: Faithfulness
key_themes.description: God's fulfillment of His promises to give Israel the land.

devotional.question: What 'Jericho walls' in your life are you trusting God to bring down?
How can you build 'memorial stones' to remember God's victories in your journey?

cultural_historical.title: The Conquest
cultural_historical.text: The book of Joshua records the transition from a wandering nation to a settled one, fulfilling the patriarchal promises.
